title: Behind the Scenes
excerpt: Yesterday was one of those nonstop days where I barely remembered to eat (hard to believe, I know). It was the set up for CHA and the booth came together just wonderfully thanks to my excellent team at American Crafts…
body:
Yesterday was one of those nonstop days where I barely remembered to eat (hard to believe, I know). It was the set up for CHA and the booth came together just wonderfully thanks to my excellent team at American Crafts who helped assemble many of the pieces. We used a lot of yarn detailing for our display. Thankfully the booth walls (and contents) traveled safely from Utah to Chicago and we were able to get it all done yesterday. Phew. Now it's go time for Day 1. Just a reminder these won't be available until the end of August. You can find my current collections available on Two Peas in a Bucket, where some of the items are 25% off thru July 21st. For those of you at home, Two Peas has put together a little preview video showcasing the new products and a chance to win a prize pack.

NOTE: Creativation (formerly CHA)
